form.formComment: Comes here second-up after two weeks. Lacklustre first-up performance when 5th over 2850m at Maure-de-Bretagne beaten 58m by Jaeger Man in 6-11yo handicap on March 24 at $76. Fully tested.

form.formComment: Returns after 11 weeks in the paddock. Finished off last preparation when well beaten into sixth behind Kaviase at Vincennes over 2700m in a 6-7yo euro open restricted race on January 19 at $16. Must be included.

form.formComment: Second up after running 7th (25m) over 2800m at Pontchateau, beaten 19m by Jalna Du Gers in 7-11yo amateur drivers handicap on March 29. Faces a tough task.

form.formComment: Beaten favourite last start when third at Caen on March 25. Won the start before at La Capelle on March 8. Going along well. Top prospects.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 11th (25m) over 2800m at Pontchateau, beaten 30m by Kelcanto Bello in 6yo handicap on March 29. Before that pulled up at Pontchateau on March 6 over 2800m. Hard to recommend on recent form.

formComments.comment: Didn't do much last time out, 11th (25m) over 2800m at Pontchateau, beaten 30m by Kelcanto Bello in 6yo handicap on March 29. Before that pulled up at Pontchateau on March 6 over 2800m. Hard to recommend on recent form.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 2nd over 2850m at Laval beaten 8.2m by Korea in 6-8yo race on March 11 at $12. Two runs back won by 5.4m at Vincennes beating Keops De Castelle in 6yo euro open on February 11 at $6.80. Perfectly placed to win again.

form.formComment: Last start a big 8.2m win at Laval beating Kristal De Janze in 6-8yo race on March 11 at $8.50. Another win looks on the cards.
